summary: Pre-redeploy beta verification — 16/16 backend pytests PASS; frontend mostly PASS except a route-collision bug that shadows the new /wallet PhantomConnect row.

ui_bugs.issue: DUPLICATE ROUTE REGISTRATION. /app/frontend/src/routes/gamesRoutes.tsx:521 registers `<Route path="/wallet" element={<VibeWallet/>}>` BEFORE /app/frontend/src/routes/miscRoutes.tsx:77 which registers the NEW `<Wallet/>` page. React Router resolves the first match, so /wallet renders the legacy VibeWallet — the new Wallet.tsx (with [data-testid=wallet-connect-phantom-row] + 'Connect Phantom Wallet' row + PhantomConnectButton) is unreachable. Selector returned 0 hits on /wallet during e2e.

issues: The pulsing pill button is labelled 'Volumetric View' / '3D' (data-testid=dashboard-try-volumetric) — review-request copy expected the label to read 'Try Volumetric'. Functionality works; cosmetic copy mismatch only.

VigilantAgent console flagged the room-info-cube-trigger pill (fixed top-16 left-3 z-[55]) as occluding underlying back buttons (e.g. BUTTON[ul-back] on /underground-live, BUTTON[tiers-back] on /tiers). Pill still works but it stacks on top of nav controls — consider z-index or left offset adjustment.

action_items: Remove the duplicate <Route path="/wallet"> from /app/frontend/src/routes/gamesRoutes.tsx (lines 520-523) so the canonical miscRoutes.tsx Wallet component renders. After fix, [data-testid=wallet-connect-phantom-row] must be visible on /wallet.
(Optional cosmetic) Update the classic-dashboard pulsing pill copy in /app/frontend/src/pages/DashboardNew.tsx:484 from 'Volumetric View' to 'Try Volumetric' to match the spec.
(Optional polish) Adjust z-index / position of the [data-testid=room-info-cube-trigger] pill so it doesn't sit on top of *-back nav buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: Route collision: two `path="/wallet"` entries (gamesRoutes.tsx + miscRoutes.tsx). React Router v6 silently keeps the first; the second is dead code. Add a lint guard or unify under a single route file to prevent future regressions.
Wallet.tsx PhantomConnectButton is shipped but unreachable in production due to the above — high-impact dead feature.
DashboardNew classic header omits an explicit 'Try Volumetric' string; reviewers using copy as the heuristic will flag it.
RoomInfoCube z-index=55 + fixed top-16/left-3 conflicts with all page back-buttons. Consider moving below the header strip or to top-right.

success_rate.frontend: 12/13 checks (92%) — only /wallet PhantomRow failed due to route shadowing

test_credentials: betatester1@globalvibez.com / BetaTester2026! — login succeeded; landed on /dashboard.
seed_data_creation: Created one TEST_pwroom_* JFTN room with password 'secret123' via betatester1; left in DB (not cleaned up).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend layer for JFTN Season Pass, Room Password gate, Gift inbox/redeem, Integrity config, Sovereign Tiers catalog (6 tiers, tastemaker $19 popular_anchor, insider $9 trial $1), Underground Live (2 seeded battles), Spectator Bet leaderboard, Receipts merchant-boosts, Recent Rooms log/me — all green. Frontend: only blocker is the /wallet route collision shadowing Wallet.tsx. Remove the duplicate Route from gamesRoutes.tsx and re-verify [data-testid=wallet-connect-phantom-row].

rca of the issue.rca: Two <Route path="/wallet"> declarations exist in the app — gamesRoutes.tsx:521 (legacy VibeWallet) and miscRoutes.tsx:77 (new Wallet.tsx with PhantomConnectButton). React Router v6 chooses the first match, so the new page never renders.
rca of the issue.reproduction: Login as betatester1 → navigate to /wallet → inspect DOM → [data-testid=wallet-connect-phantom-row] returns 0 nodes; the rendered tree corresponds to VibeWallet (no PhantomConnectButton import).
rca of the issue.mitigation: Delete or comment out lines 520-523 of /app/frontend/src/routes/gamesRoutes.tsx. miscRoutes.tsx already owns the canonical /wallet → Wallet.tsx mapping.
